pi_items.source: task.json line 17, setup_task.sh line 13, export_result.sh line 13 - all consistently reference this path
Task description specifies TSR range 1-10 with step 0.5, yielding (10-1)/0.5 = 18 intervals or 19 data points including both endpoints
Task description states 'TSR Range: Start=1'. Verified in verifier.py line 139 which checks min(tsr_vals) <= 1.5
Task description states 'TSR Range: End=10'. Verified in verifier.py line 139 which checks max(tsr_vals) >= 9.5

Task description 'Delta/Step=0.5'. Verifier.py implements this as allowing min <= 1.5 (start + 0.5) and max >= 9.5 (end - 0.5). Web search confirmed TSR sweep simulation parameters support step-based ranges.

privileged_info_summary: This task is a synthetic simulation using QBlade v0.96.2, an open-source wind turbine BEM analysis tool. The task requires agents to perform a TSR (Tip Speed Ratio) sweep from 1 to 10 with step 0.5 at fixed 10 m/s wind speed, producing approximately 19 data points in a Cp-TSR characteristic curve. The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/projects/cp_tsr_results.txt. Cp values are physically constrained by the Betz limit (maximum 0.593), with realistic wind turbine peaks typically at 0.45-0.50 for optimal TSR around 5-7. The verifier accepts data with min TSR ≤ 1.5 and max TSR ≥ 9.5.
